Application.Name: Microsoft Power BI Desktop for Report Server
Application.Description: Power BI is a suite of business analytics tools that deliver insights throughout your organization. Connect to hundreds of data sources, simplify data prep, and drive ad hoc analysis. Produce beautiful reports, then publish them for your organization to consume on the web and across mobile devices. Everyone can create personalized dashboards with a unique, 360-degree view of their business. And scale across the enterprise, with governance and security built-in.

DeploymentType.Name: DeploymentType1
DeploymentType.DeploymentTypeName: Silent Installer for Microsoft Power BI Desktop for Report Server x64
DeploymentType.Comments: Silent Installer for Microsoft Power BI Desktop for Report Server x64

Deployment.DeploymentCollection: Microsoft Power BI Desktop for Report Server-Test
